reason: MSA Section 3.1 requires payment within 30 days, but SOW Section 4.1 extends this to 90 days — a direct contradiction that creates legal ambiguity over which term governs.
playbookRuleViolated: Payment terms must not exceed 30 days per Standard Playbook v2.1, Rule 4.3

evidence.quote: All invoices shall be settled within 30 (thirty) days from the date of receipt of invoice.
Client shall remit payment within 90 (ninety) days of invoice date.

redline.suggestedText: Client shall remit payment within 30 (thirty) days of invoice date, consistent with Section 3.1 of the Master Services Agreement.
